turns.text: My result does me playing the wrong opponent
Imported event (USTA, ITF, etc.)

For an incorrect opponent on an imported score, you can report it directly from your profile using the three-dot menu:

1. Go to your UTR Sports profile and scroll to your match history.
2. Open the scorecard for the match showing the wrong opponent.
3. Tap the **three-dot menu (⋮)** in the top corner of the scorecard.
4. Submit the report — you'll get a confirmation that your request was received. You may be asked to provide a URL to the official results page where the correct information can be verified.

Could you give that a try? If it doesn't work or you run into any issues, I can escalate this to our support team.
Please escalate to the support team
Sure! Could you share your UTR Sports profile link and the details of the match — including the date, the correct opponent, and the source (e.g., USTA, ITF)?
Hey, I can't reset my password, help! email is [email], thanks - Joyce C

You're unable to reset your password and want to regain access to your account — got it, Joyce!

Here are a few things to check:

1. **Check the correct email** — Make sure you're entering **[email]** and not a secondary email address.
2. **Check all mail folders** — The reset email can sometimes land in your **spam, junk, or promotions** folder.
3. **Wait a few minutes** — Occasionally there's a short delay before the email arrives.

If you've tried all of the above and still haven't received the reset email, I can escalate this to our support team for investigation. Can you confirm:
- Are you on **web, iOS, or Android**?
- Is there an exact error message you're seeing, or does the reset email simply not arrive?
yes, yes, still no email tried that earlier, web

Got it — the password reset email isn't arriving despite checking all folders, and you're on web. I'll escalate this to our support team right away.

I have your name as **Joyce C** and email as **[email]** — is that correct? Also, could you provide your **full last name** so I can submit the ticket properly?
just C
No problem! Let me check your account and get this escalated for you.

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is **#840481**. Our team will investigate why the password reset email isn't reaching your inbox and help you regain access.

Is there anything else I can help you with?
no thx
You're welcome, Joyce! Good luck getting back in — hope it's sorted quickly. Take care! 👋
Invalid match is showing in my UTR

I can help with that. Let me clarify what's happening with the match:

**Is the match showing an incorrect score, or is it a match that shouldn't be there at all?** For example:
- Wrong opponent name or score
- Duplicate entry (same match listed twice)
- Match from the wrong event or date

Once I understand the issue, I'll get you sorted.
Shouldnt be there at all

Got it — there's a match on your profile that shouldn't be there at all.

To help you get this removed, I need a few details:

1. **Your full name**
2. **Your email address**
3. **A link to your UTR profile** (or just confirm your profile name)
4. **The match details** — opponent name, date it was played, and which event or tournament it's from (if you know it)

Once I have these, I'll escalate this to our team to remove it.

Ceejay Ah-See
[email]
Ceejay Ah-See
May 11 verses Megan Neville - I won 6-3. There is a duplicate match there where it shows Megan won 3-6

Thanks for those details. Just to confirm before I escalate:

**Is this match from a UTR-hosted event** (like a UTR tournament you registered for), **or did it come from another source** like USTA, Tennis Australia, or another organization?

This helps our team prioritize the removal.
Came [location]
Perfect. Let me escalate this to our team so they can remove the duplicate match showing Megan winning 3-6.

Perfect! Your support ticket has been created — **your ticket number is #840506**.

Our team will review your profile and remove that duplicate match showing the incorrect 3-6 result. You should hear back within 24–48 hours. Is there anything else I can help with?
That is all
Great! Thanks for reaching out, Ceejay. Your ticket #840506 is in our queue and the team will get that sorted for you soon. Have a great day! 👋
